content.en:
After this eighth-level personal world was conceived, Gu Hengshan immediately deduced the situation of this eighth-level personal world.

And the top of the Blood Fang is also the first time to explore this eighth-level personality world.

Of course.

The Lord of the Blood Fangs didn't pay much attention to it at first, so he didn't inform the Ice Beast Palace.

He just stared at Gu Heng Mountain, preventing Gu Heng Mountain's origin realm from approaching.

And a group of bone transformation realms infiltrated that eighth-level personality world.

According to their detection, the Origin Realm could not enter that world, but the Bone Transformation Realm could enter.

......

Inside the eighth-level personal world.

A group of Bone Transformation Realms came in, and then began to search for resources here.

This world is very big, there are many territories, and the suppression of them is also very great.

They feared danger, so they searched very carefully.

Fortunately, no danger was found.

One of the Nine Bone Transformation Realms was named the Lord of Tan Mountain, and he was also one of the people searching for resources.

He searched for it, and suddenly sensed a familiar aura.

"It's ......"

He dug out a stone from the depths of the earth.

"The Source Stone of the Other Side!"

Seeing this piece of source stone on the other side, his face was shocked.

Then, he continued to excavate this area, and soon dug up one source stone after another.

In the end, he dug up about thirty pieces of the source stone from the other side.

Thereupon.

He immediately contacted the other bone transformations, and learned that there were also several bone transformation realms that had also found the source stones on the other side, although there were not many of them, but they had only come in not long ago!

"This world is not ordinary!"

The Lord of Tan Mountain immediately went out of this world to find the Lord of the Blood Fangs.

......

"Lord Tan Mountain, aren't you in that world, why did you come out so quickly?"

The Lord of the Blood Fangs asked.

The Lord of Tan Mountain immediately took out those other side source stones: "Chief, we haven't been in that world for long, and we have found so many other side source stones. If I hadn't guessed wrong, that world would have given birth to a large number of Source Stones from the other side! The value of the Source Stones from the Other Shore is very high, and many big forces are buying them, so we have made a fortune this time!"

"Are you sure?"

The Lord of the Blood Fangs asked.

"Sure!"

The Lord of Tan Mountain nodded.

At this time, the Lord of Blood Fang was also very excited.

He didn't plan to inform the Ice Beast Palace about this matter, otherwise if the Ice Beast Palace took over, he wouldn't be able to gain much.

"Send all the bone transformation realms at the top of our blood fangs into it, and dig out the source stones on the other side as soon as possible. "

The Lord of the Blood Fangs said excitedly.

......

Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Dragon Zero and several other deputy mountain masters are all deducing.

"That world is extraordinary, and it definitely breeds good things!"

The Lord of Dragon Zero.

At this moment, a bone transformation realm at the top of the Blood Fang sent a message to Gu Heng Mountain.

This bone transformation realm is an undercover agent of Gu Heng Mountain, and his status is not high.

But this time, the top of the Blood Fang sent this bone transformation realm into that eighth-level personality world, so the other party learned the specific news.

"Indeed, as we deduced, that eighth-level personal world has given birth to good things, which are the source stones of the other side, and the number is estimated to be quite a lot. "The Lord of Dragon Zero has plans to do it.

As for the war, let's fight, this time it will directly destroy the top of the Blood Fang. If the Ice Beast Palace dares to take charge, then start a war!" a deputy mountain master suggested.

"Well, talk to the mountain lord!"

Subsequently.

They contacted the mountain owner and received a positive answer.

Therefore, several Mountain Lords of the Origin Realm prepared to go over, trapping the Lord of the Blood Fang first, and it was best to kill the Lord of the Blood Fang.

And one of the venerable lords of Gu Heng Mountain also got the order to act at any time.

At this time.

Ye Tian naturally got the news.

"Gu Heng Mountain is going to attack the top of the Blood Fang, why is this?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

But since it was the order of those deputy mountain masters of Gu Heng Mountain, he naturally had to obey it.

Thereupon.

He summoned the envoys and inspectors under his command, ready to invade the top of the Bloodfangs.

It's bound to be a big fight!

......

Near the eighth-level personal world.

The Lord of the Blood Fang is keeping watch nearby.

Suddenly.

His face changed.

"Several deputy mountain masters of Guheng Mountain!!!"

He did spot the other party's aura, but it was too late to stop it.

Rumble!!!!!

The Lord of Eternal Zero, they have come.

And five Origin Realms came at once.

He knew that it must have been this eighth-level personality world that had been exposed, causing the invasion of Gu Heng Mountain.

He instantly asked the Ice Beast Palace for help.

Even if he wanted to monopolize this eight-pole personality world, he obviously couldn't occupy it now, so he could only share it with the Ice Beast Palace.

Otherwise, if the Ice Beast Palace doesn't support it, he will fall.

The Polar Realm of Ice.

In a plane frozen in ice, palaces are suspended there.

This is the Ice Beast Palace.

Wow!!!!

Huge humanoid ice beasts came out of the palaces.

"The top of the blood tooth asks for help, Gu Heng Mountain invades, and it seems to have something to do with a world, and that world has a lot of source stones from the other side. It can make Gu Heng Mountain's heart move, and he will not hesitate to start a war with us, and he will invade the top of the Blood Fang. There must be a lot of source stones on the other side of that world, so go and support it immediately!"

Whew!!

These Origin Realm Ice Beasts tore through the void and hurried to the top of the Blood Fangs.

Meanwhile.

A large number of the Venerable Lords of Gu Heng Mountain received the order to immediately invade the top of the Blood Fangs and enter that world to slaughter the bone transformation realms of the top of the Blood Fangs.

And after Ye Tian got the news, he came over as soon as possible.

Soon.

The fight has begun!

Rumble!!!!

A Venerable Bone Transformation Realm was killed by Ye Tian.

Compared to Gu Heng Mountain, the top of the Blood Fang is really nothing, and it is not an opponent at all.

Abrupt.

A Nine-Order Bone Transformation Realm stopped Ye Tian, but this was just an ordinary Nine-Order Bone Transformation Realm-breaking genius.

The other party saw that Ye Tian was only seven bone transformation realms, and he also knew that he was a genius at the other side, but he didn't think how powerful Ye Tian was, so he dared to make a move.

After all, an ordinary other-level genius can only cross two levels to deal with a boundary-breaking genius.

The other side level genius of the seventh bone transformation realm is equivalent to the boundary breaking genius of the ninth bone transformation realm.

However, he underestimated Ye Tian and overestimated himself.

"Xuanyang Jinmang!"

Burst!

The sword light penetrated through this boundary-breaking genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm.

In an instant, the other party's flesh began to crumble.

"Impossible......"

The other party's face was full of incredulity, and he didn't believe that he would be killed by Ye Tian in one blow at all.

Click!

This Nine-Time Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Genius had completely fallen and died.

And those venerable envoys and patrol envoys under Ye Tian's command were dumbfounded one by one, they were boundary-breaking geniuses of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and they were actually killed by their Venerable Lord in seconds!

They also all know that their lord is a genius at the other side, but his cultivation is not high, how can he have such terrifying strength!

"The Lord is invincible!"

"The Lord is invincible!"

"The Lord is invincible!"

A respected envoy and an inspector complimented.

"Follow me into that eighth-level world, this is the most important task!"

Ye Tian ordered.
